name: newapi-group-monitor
description: Lightweight New API group success-rate status page for Cloudflare Workers and D1.

scripts.db:init: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --persist-to=.wrangler/state --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --persist-to=.wrangler/state --file=./migrations/0002_sessions.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --persist-to=.wrangler/state --file=./migrations/0003_channel_visibility.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --persist-to=.wrangler/state --file=./migrations/0004_security.sql
scripts.db:init:remote: wrangler d1 execute newapi-group-monitor --remote --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute newapi-group-monitor --remote --file=./migrations/0002_sessions.sql && wrangler d1 execute newapi-group-monitor --remote --file=./migrations/0003_channel_visibility.sql && wrangler d1 execute newapi-group-monitor --remote --file=./migrations/0004_security.sql
